priceReduction.title: Ways to reduce the price
priceReduction.exceedInfo: Your desired budget has been exceeded by
priceReduction.recommendation: To reduce the cost of the leotard, we recommend changing some of your selected parameters:
priceReduction.noBudgetComparison: If you would like to reduce the price, here are some ways you can do it:
priceReduction.noRecommendations: No possible cost reductions with current parameters

recommendations.rhinestoneMinimal: Remove rhinestones and use minimal set
recommendations.rhinestoneStandard: Replace maximum rhinestones with standard set
recommendations.rhinestoneMaximum: Replace premium rhinestones with standard set
recommendations.urgencyStandard: Change from expedited to standard production time
